nodes.label: दान का हिसाब (Account of Charity)
nodes.description: A story about the true meaning of charity and giving from the heart

nodes.label: कहानी का विषय (Theme)
nodes.description: True charity comes from the heart, not from keeping accounts or showing off

nodes.label: सच्चा दान (True Charity)
nodes.description: Giving selflessly without expecting praise or keeping score

nodes.label: दिखावे का दान (Charity for Show)
nodes.description: Giving only to impress others and gain praise - not genuine charity

nodes.label: पात्र (Characters)
nodes.description: The people in the story who show different attitudes towards giving

nodes.label: हिसाब रखने वाला (The Accountant)
nodes.description: The person who keeps track of every donation and tells everyone about it

nodes.label: सच्चा दानी (The True Giver)
nodes.description: The person who gives quietly without wanting recognition

nodes.label: मूल्य / सीख (Values / Lesson)
nodes.description: Important values and morals we learn from the story

nodes.label: उदारता (Generosity)
nodes.description: Being generous and sharing with others from the heart

nodes.label: परोपकार (Selfless Service)
nodes.description: Helping others without expecting anything in return

nodes.label: नम्रता (Humility)
nodes.description: Being humble about one's good deeds and not boasting

nodes.label: दान के प्रकार (Types of Charity)
nodes.description: Different ways to practise charity in daily life

nodes.label: धन दान (Money/Material)
nodes.description: Giving money, food, clothes, or other material things to those in need

nodes.label: सेवा दान (Service)
nodes.description: Giving your time and effort to help others - equally valuable as giving money
